About Iain Duncan Smith

Events

Read more

Proudly Serving Chingford & Woodford Green

Safer Streets. Better schools. Control of our borders. Levelling Up.
I'm working hard to deliver on your local community priorities. A record of delivery and a promise of more.
In Chingford & Woodford Green, that means campaigning for more local police and essential services - from delivering the new Whipps Cross hospital to protecting the area from over-development. If you'd like to help me, along with our hard-working councillors, London Assembly Members and hundreds of friendly volunteers, join us today. Together we will get the job done.

Find out more

Iain Duncan Smith MP for Chingford and Woodford Green
